mapper.select: select * from showcle_member where email = #{email} and discarded = 0
mapper.insert: insert into showcle_member_mail_auth (email, code, send_dt, expired_dt) values (#{email}, #{code}, now(), now() + interval '5 minute')
mapper.select: select idx, code from showcle_member_mail_auth where email = #{email} and expired_dt > now() and auth_dt is null order by send_dt desc limit 1
select count(*) from showcle_member_mail_auth where email = #{email} and auth_dt is not null
